name: Destined Threads
descriptionTemplate:
When Arachne is in the team, the {Ultra} Realm reweaves into {Singularity: Ultra}.
{Dimension Shuttle}: After playing the first Command Card each turn, a {Fleeting}, Basic Copy of it will be put into {Ultra Space} and granted 25 stacks of {Singularity Beacon}. This cannot trigger during {Ultra Rounds}. If a card triggers {Dimension Shuttle}, it also benefits from the effects of {Singularity Beacon}.
{Singularity Beacon}: For each stack, a card's Final DMG, {STR} & {Tentacle DMG} gain, Fixed-value {Poison} & {Counter} each +2%; Final Shield, HP Recovery, and {STR▼} each +1%. This effect clears when the card is played. Cards with this effect cannot trigger {Dimension Shuttle}.
{Ultra Space}: When full, beginning the {Ultra Round} does not end the turn nor does it start one; discard all non-{Retain} cards, resolve their {Fleeting} effects, pull all cards from {Ultra Space}, and set Arithmetica to 5. This current turn continues as an {Ultra Round}.
{Singularity Annihilation}: Pull the leftmost card out from {Ultra Space} and into your hand. 3 turns cooldown.
At the start of investigation, gain +50% DMG Amplification and 15 stacks of {Singularity Prism}.
{Singularity Prism}: All Command Cards' effects increase as though they had this many stacks of {Singularity Beacon}.
{Ultra Mastery}: For each 1 point of Realm Mastery, {Singularity Beacon} stacks from {Singularity Prism} and {Dimension Shuttle} increase by 0.05%.
{Pure Ultra}: If the team consists only of {Ultra} or {Chaos} Awakeners, the {Ultra Mastery} effect and Realm DMG Amplification are doubled.
